source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal cytokeratin characteristic of aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung disease
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the aberrant epithelial identity of basaloid cells
KRT8 is a luminal cytokeratin co-expressed with KRT17 in aberrant basaloid cells of IPF lungs
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase strongly associated with IPF pathology and aberrant basaloid cells
CDH1 (E-cadherin) marks the epithelial character of aberrant basaloid cells
GDF15 is a stress-response cytokine highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lungs
SOX4 is a transcription factor associated with the transitional/progenitor state of aberrant basaloid cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface marker enriched in aberrant basaloid cells
ITGB6 activates TGF-beta and is a hallmark integrin of aberrant basaloid cells in pulmonary fibrosis
CD24 is a surface glycoprotein marking the aberrant basaloid cell population in fibrotic lungs
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein and canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting lipid metabolism
MARCO is a scavenger receptor specifically expressed on alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a master transcription factor driving alveolar macrophage differentiation and identity
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor characteristic of tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid handling function
C1QA is a complement component produced by alveolar macrophages for innate immune defense
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue-resident macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine preferentially secreted by alveolar macrophages in the lung
APOE is an apolipoprotein involved in lipid metabolism characteristic of alveolar macrophages
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells, essential for gas exchange surface
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is critical for AT1 cell membrane structure and caveolae formation

CLDN18 is a tight junction protein specifically expressed in alveolar epithelial cells including AT1
CLIC5 is a chloride channel enriched in AT1 cells involved in fluid homeostasis
SFTA2 (surfactant-associated 2) is expressed in alveolar epithelium including AT1 cells
NTM (neurotrimin) is a cell adhesion molecule highly enriched in AT1 cells
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the definitive canonical marker of alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate defense
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 in AT2 cells
NAPSA (napsin A) is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant protein processing in AT2 cells
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter in lamellar bodies essential for surfactant packaging in AT2 cells
SFTPD (surfactant protein D) is a collectin secreted by AT2 cells for host defense
SLC34A2 is a phosphate transporter specifically expressed in AT2 cells for surfactant phospholipid synthesis
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor produced by AT2 cells for epithelial defense
MS4A1 (CD20) is the canonical B cell surface marker used for identification and therapeutic targeting
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
BANK1 is a B cell scaffold protein specifically expressed in B lymphocytes
EBF1 is a transcription factor essential for B cell lineage commitment and development
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor critical for mature B cell maintenance
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
BCL11A is a transcription factor required for B cell development and differentiation
BACH2 is a transcription factor critical for B cell maturation and class switch recombination
MEF2C is a transcription factor important for B cell survival and proliferation
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell cytokeratin in airway epithelium
KRT15 is a basal cell keratin marking progenitor basal cells in the airway
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in basal epithelial cells

ITGA2 (CD49b) is an integrin subunit mediating basal cell adhesion to the basement membrane
